title: urochloa fasciculata
intro: Urochloa fasciculata, also known as panic grass or signal grass, is a species of grass that is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Urochloa fasciculata include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine as a poultice or decoction.
